---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: mateocallec
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem or gap this feature would address.
_Example: "There is no way to encrypt a stream without buffering the entire payload in memory."_

## Proposed solution

Describe what you would like to happen, including any API ideas.

```typescript
// Example of how the API might look
```

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have already tried or considered.

## Security considerations

If this feature touches cryptographic primitives or key material, describe any security implications you are aware of.

## Additional context

Links to relevant standards, papers, or other libraries that implement this.
